title: cinnamomum mayanum
intro: Cinnamomum mayanum, also known as the Mayan cinnamon or Mayan canela, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae, native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum mayanum include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
